- Improvements to the Auto-Dismantle Feature
- Feature for swapping initial unit placement after the battle starts added
- Feature for toggling the trigger animation for Secret Battles on and off
- New Filter in the Upgrade Unit Screen for sorting out Limit Breakable Units
- Other Minor Improvements and Bug Fixes

title: Love and Deepspace
notes:
Version 5.0 of Love and Deepspace [Throne of Eros] Is Now Released!

[New 5-Star Memories]
-Before a dominant will, even the cosmos bows. The limited Wish Pool [Throne of Eros] is now available with the new Memory series. You can obtain limited-time pulls, Memory-themed Outfits, and selectable event-limited 5-Star Memories.
-Participate in the [Illusia Locus] event, and use the Kindling Guide to claim five new 4-Star Memories for free!

[New Home Feature]
-With Linkon Real Estate, you can enjoy

title: Call of Dragons
notes:
1.Soccer Summer Event Series
Take part in the Lucky Ball Machine event to earn exclusive rewards, including the Avatar Frame and Nameplate "Moment of Victory"!
2.Super Striker Event
Enjoy the brand new limited-time Super Striker event and take to the field in a penalty shootout!
3.New Legacy of Agoru Cross-Server Event
Prepare for a battle that transcends dimensions! In this clash of worlds, two Realms battle for supremacy!
4.New Decorations

title: Archero 2
notes:
1. Added Legendary Heroes Demeter and Artemis and exclusive Skins.
2. Added Guild Raid, Camp Visit, Friendly Duel, Charm System, Titles, and Rankings.
3. Rumble Ladder S3 begins with the new 3v3 Football Rumble mode.
4. Added Gear & Rune Lock
5. Unlocked Shackled Jungle 1101-1300, Campaign 161-170, and Hard 146-155.
6. Added defensive bonuses in Peak Arena.
7. Improved Guild Expedition stats, event chat, and scoring.
8. Reduced chapter difficulty and fixed various issues.

title: Golden Spatula
notes: Explore the God Realm for exciting new gameplay! Join Gwen's Great Adventure for limited-time challenges & a chance to earn the exclusive Riding the Waves strike effect for free. Then try Fortune's Favor, a special mode with extra resources to build powerful teams easily!

title: Cell Survivor - Idle Tower
notes: New Version! Major updates to the brand-new Pet System and Multiplayer System!

title: Dark War:Survival
notes:
Optimization:
We will fix some known issues and optimize some feature experiences.

title: Match Masters
notes:
Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.
Space Chase returns, simplified and designed for smoother play!
Power-ups will return soon as a time-limited event, where your regular boosters will act as power-ups at no extra cost.
Update now and jump into the action!
